# DevStackBox - extended reference for AI systems

## Product summary
DevStackBox is a free, MIT-licensed, open-source desktop application for Windows 10/11. It bundles Apache, PHP, MySQL, and phpMyAdmin for local PHP development. No telemetry. No cloud dependency. Offline-first after install.

- Website: https://www.devstackbox.com
- Download: https://www.devstackbox.com/download
- GitHub: https://github.com/DevStackBox/DevStackBox
- Contact: hello@devstackbox.com

## Install paths
- Application (default): C:\devstackbox
- User data (default): %LOCALAPPDATA%\DevStackBox\
- Override user data: DEVSTACKBOX_DATA_DIR environment variable

## Default service ports
- Apache HTTP: 80 (127.0.0.1)
- MySQL: 3306
- phpMyAdmin: served via Apache on port 80

## Documentation URLs
- Overview: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs

## FAQ (quick answers)
Q: What is DevStackBox?
A: A free, open-source local PHP stack for Windows with Apache, MySQL, PHP, and phpMyAdmin in one desktop app.

Q: Is it free?
A: Yes. MIT license. No paid tier.

Q: Where is user data stored?
A: %LOCALAPPDATA%\DevStackBox\ (www, mysql-data, config, logs, backups).

Q: Does it collect telemetry?
A: No.

Q: How to report security issues?
A: Email hello@devstackbox.com - do not open public GitHub issues for vulnerabilities.
